arts.ttl: Gary Neville makes fresh Chelsea Premier League title prediction amid Enzo Maresca verdict
arts.sum: "At this moment in time, obviously, Liverpool are big favourites, but I can't believe they're not going to hit a bad patch at some point, I can't believe it’s 13 games in and we're only a third of the season gone." And former United and England defender Neville has shared the same view as Maresca, and doesn't think Chelsea are going to fight for the title alongside Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Christopher Nkunku among seven changes for Southampton game
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku named in much-changed Chelsea XI for the Premier League game at Southampton on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca Believes Chelsea 'Can Dominate English Soccer' in Coming Years
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca continues to insist Chelsea is not in the title race this season. But in five to 10 years?

arts.ttl: Huge Chelsea Club World Cup announcement made as huge TV contract signed
arts.sum: Concerns had circulated amongst club sources due to FIFA's delay in selling broadcasting rights for the upcoming summer tournament set for the US, sparking a series of legal challenges from player unions and domestic leagues over the event's timing. Leagues are worried about the impact of the Club World Cup on their fixtures, questioning if teams like Manchester City and Chelsea can be fully fit for the start of the 2025-26 season on August 17.

arts.ttl: Why have Chelsea qualified for the FIFA Club World Cup 2025?
arts.sum: Why Chelsea have qualified for the new-look FIFA Club World Cup in 2025.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Liverpool - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot's side look to continue dominant run plus updates from Southampton vs Chelsea, Man City vs Nottingham Forest and Everton vs Wolves
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates as Newcastle host Liverpool in Premier League action, plus updates from the rest of Wednesday's 7:30pm kick-offs.

arts.ttl: Report: Former Chelsea player who left club last year could already be about to have his contract terminated
arts.sum: Could he be on the move again?

arts.ttl: Three Chelsea stars drop early team news hints ahead of Southampton as Noni Madueke decision made
arts.sum: Chelsea head to Southampton in third, level on points with second-place Arsenal, while their opponents sit bottom of the Premier League on just one win all season. Madueke, who had started 11 successive top-flight matches, was dropped to the bench for Sunday's 3-0 win over Aston Villa with Pedro Neto coming back into the line up.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa slumped to 14th in Premier League after a humbling 3-0 defeat by Chelsea that saw winless run extend to EIGHT matches... What's going on at the club? Is Unai Emery's job under threat?
arts.sum: Aston Villa are currently a team in dire straits. Their 3-0 loss to Chelsea at the weekend was compounded by a toothless performance.

arts.ttl: Southampton vs Chelsea LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: The Blues head to the south coast confident of victory
